companies.name: GitLab
companies.notes: Fully distributed since founding — 2000+ team across 65+ countries. Great async culture.

companies.name: Automattic
companies.notes: Makes WordPress.com, Tumblr, WooCommerce. Team across 90+ countries.

companies.name: Zapier
companies.notes: Automation tooling. Strong remote culture with competitive benefits.

companies.name: Buffer
companies.notes: Social media tools. Extremely transparent — posts salaries publicly.

companies.name: Shopify
companies.notes: Went digital-by-default in 2020. Strong engineering culture.

companies.name: Figma
companies.notes: Design tools. Many remote roles in engineering and product.

companies.name: Linear
companies.notes: Issue tracking for product teams. Small and highly selective hiring.

companies.name: Stripe
companies.notes: Payments infrastructure. Many remote engineering roles, offices globally.

companies.name: Notion
companies.notes: Productivity tooling. Growing team with remote roles across multiple time zones.

companies.name: Basecamp
companies.notes: Project management pioneers. Small team, wrote the book on remote work.
